## Summary

Update the **Zcore-Landing** marketing site to link to the canonical dapp URL **`https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app`**, ensuring a seamless path from landing CTA → intro splash → wallet registration.

Landing and dapp live in **separate repositories**; this issue tracks cross-repo coordination.

---

## Background

| App | Repo | URL |
|-----|------|-----|
| Landing | `Zcorehub/Zcore-Landing` | https://zcore-landing.vercel.app |
| DApp | `Zcorehub/ZCore-dev` (Front/) | https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app |

The dapp was renamed from `zcore` / `zcore-xi` to **`dapp-zcore`**. Legacy alias `zcore-xi.vercel.app` may still resolve but should not be used in marketing CTAs.

Users clicking "Launch App" on landing must not hit:
- `localhost:3001`
- Deprecated `zcore-xi.vercel.app` (unless intentionally kept as redirect)
- Broken / 401 SSO-protected URLs

---

## Tasks

### In Zcore-Landing repo (primary work)

1. **Find dapp URL helper** — search for:
   - `getDappUrl()`
   - `NEXT_PUBLIC_DAPP_URL`
   - Hardcoded `zcore-xi`, `zcore.vercel`, `localhost`

2. **Update to canonical URL:**
   ```
   https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app
   ```

3. **Update all CTAs:**
   - Hero "Launch" / "Open App" buttons
   - Footer links
   - Mobile nav
   - Any docs/deep links in landing content

4. **Environment variables (Vercel — landing project):**
   | Env | Production value |
   |-----|------------------|
   | `NEXT_PUBLIC_DAPP_URL` | `https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app` |
   | Preview | Vercel preview dapp URL or staging |

5. **Optional:** API docs link → `https://zcore-api.vercel.app/api-docs`

### In ZCore-dev repo (this repo)

1. Update `README.md` Live URLs table if needed
2. Add cross-reference in `CONTRIBUTING.md`:
   > Landing repo must point to dapp-zcore.vercel.app — see issue #22

---

## Smoke test checklist

Execute after landing deploy:

- [ ] Open https://zcore-landing.vercel.app
- [ ] Click primary CTA → lands on https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app/
- [ ] Intro splash "Launch the App" → `/register`
- [ ] No browser console CORS errors to API
- [ ] Mobile viewport: CTA works
- [ ] Preview deployment: preview landing → preview dapp (if configured)

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Landing production uses `dapp-zcore.vercel.app` exclusively in CTAs
- [ ] No stale URLs in landing source (grep verified)
- [ ] Both READMEs document the split and canonical URLs
- [ ] PR link recorded in this issue (Zcore-Landing PR URL)

---

## Related

- #10 design alignment (visual continuity landing ↔ dapp)
- #20 Vercel Git deploys
- Dapp `metadataBase`: `Front/app/layout.tsx` → `https://dapp-zcore.vercel.app`

---

## Notes

- This issue may require a PR in **Zcore-Landing**, not only ZCore-dev
- Assignee needs access to both repos or coordinate with landing maintainer
- Do not change dapp routing in this issue — only landing outbound links
